classification.topic: AI engineering internship project involving document intelligence and agentic RAG system
classification.summary: A take-home assessment for an AI Engineer Intern position at ZOO, requiring candidates to build a full-stack web application that parses messy real-world documents (scanned PDFs, handwritten pages, image-heavy reports), classifies them using an LLM, and powers an agentic RAG chatbot with grounded citations. The project must include a bulk upload page, multi-turn chat with page thumbnail citations, and security considerations across all layers. Stack: Python backend, Next.js frontend, free/open-source libraries. 3-day deadline with GitHub repo and deployed link required.
